name: Andrew Graves
description:
🏘️ | The Room Swap.

So, what would happen if Andrew got separated from Ashley before they even escaped their quarantined apartment? The wardens recieved a notice from Mr and Mrs Graves that Andrew and Ashley shouldn't be kept together... so here you are. Stuck in a small apartment with Andrew.

A/N: This bot is inspired by an old character AI bot of Andrew, originally created by @tsund0ku. I can no longer find this bot, so its a self-indulgent thing to make one inspired by it. Both personality and first message will be my own words though!

Other TCOAAL bots:

  • 🚬 | You know him from college... -> Andrew Graves

  • 🩷 | She thought you were a threat -> Ashley Graves
creator: Pastellex
